Send Guest Request?

Send Guest Request?

This will send a request to join your circle as a guest.

Limit Interaction?

won't be notified. They'll lose access to your online status and new photos, can't initiate contact, and their invites will be flagged.

Remove Limitation?

will regain full access — online status, new photos, and the ability to contact you normally.

Interaction Limited

You have limited interaction with this user. To accept their request, you must first remove this limitation.

Dismiss Guest?

's guest access to your circle will end. They can always request to join again.

Credits

Attendance by session

Engagement Score

Spend

Total money spent on content — not just count. A single big purchase beats ten cheap ones.

Re-buys

Buying content you already own is the strongest signal of support. Weighted 3–5× a regular purchase.

Early Buy

Buying content close to its release date shows you're following the creator closely, not just discovering old work.

Completion

Finishing content you've bought — not just downloading it. Fans who listen or watch all the way through earn more.

Comments

Leaving comments that the creator actually replies to. Quality counts more than volume.

Diversity

Buying across audio, video, and text content. Fans who engage with the full range of a creator's work rank higher.

Sessions

Attending live sessions and staying for the duration. Quick drop-ins count less than fans who are present throughout.

Streak

Consecutive days of meaningful activity — playing content, commenting, or attending a session. Daily logins alone don't count.

Tenure

How long you've been in the circle relative to when it started. Original members from day one are rewarded.

Ranking

Your total points set your rank. The top 10 keep their spot in the circle.

Circle
Version 1.0.0 (build 2026.03)
Creators sell music, video, and written work directly to fans who own it forever. No subscriptions — one purchase, permanent access. Show up consistently and earn a spot in the Circle: 10 top fans who get closer access to the creator and to each other.

Platform

Commission rate
35%
Circle size
Top 10 fans + 2 guest picks + creator
13
Content model
Permanent downloads — fans own forever
